categories.name: Digital Signage
categories.tagline: Floor totems, wall mounts & indoor LED displays
categories.description: High-brightness digital signage solutions for retail, hospitality, and corporate environments. Available as floor totems, wall mounts, and indoor LED units with touch capability.

products.name: A Type Standee (Floor Totem)
products.description: Professional floor-standing digital display totem for retail, events, and corporate environments. Available in multiple sizes from 24" to 98" with FHD, UHD, or 4K resolution. Android 10 powered with 24/7 operation capability.

products.name: Indoor LED Digital Signages
products.description: Commercial-grade LED digital signage with pedestal mount. Available in 32", 43", and 50" with UHD, 4K, and FHD options. Features anti-glare technology and capacitive touch for interactive engagement.

products.name: A Type Standee (Wall Mount)
products.description: Professional wall-mounted digital display for retail, corporate, and hospitality. 178° ultra-wide viewing angle, portrait/landscape mounting, and intelligent split-screen capability.

categories.name: Active LED
categories.tagline: Modular portable LED for indoor & outdoor events
categories.description: High-brightness modular active LED display systems fully customizable in size and resolution. SMD, COB, and GOB technology for both indoor and outdoor applications.

products.name: Active LED Portable Standee
products.short_description: Modular LED display · SMD/COB/GOB · Fully customizable · 24/7 operation
products.description: Professional modular active LED display for portable and mobile installations. Fully customizable size, HD to 4K resolution, SMD/COB/GOB technology, and 24/7 operation with exceptional brightness.
key_features: SMD, COB, and GOB LED technologies

categories.name: Conference Audio
categories.description: Professional audio systems for conference spaces with AI noise suppression, 360° pickup, and PoE cascading for unlimited room coverage.

products.name: Digital Array Microphone — NT-M702A/C
products.description: Cascading omnidirectional digital array microphone for business meetings, interactive teaching, and large conference spaces. 360° pickup with AI-assisted audio processing and PoE cascading for up to 6 units.
key_features: PoE cascading — up to 6 units on one cable
AI algorithms: AEC, ANS, AGC for echo/noise removal
Built-in audio processing — no external processor needed

products.name: Smart Conferencing Speakerphone — NT-A10W
products.short_description: 360° Pickup · 10m Range · AI Noise Reduction · Hi-Fi Speaker
products.description: Advanced smart conferencing speakerphone with 360° omnidirectional pickup, 10-meter range, AI noise cancellation, and Hi-Fi dual-frequency speaker. Covers rooms of 6–20 participants.
key_features: 10m effective range — covers up to 20 participants
AI noise, echo, and reverberation elimination
Auto gain control for consistent voice pickup
Hi-Fi dual-frequency speaker with deep bass

categories.name: Conference Video
categories.description: All-in-one video conferencing solutions from a single 4K webcam to advanced dual-lens PTZ video bars with AI auto-framing and speaker tracking.

products.name: 4K Business Webcam — NTJX1700WC
products.description: Professional 4K business webcam with 8MP CMOS sensor, 78° field of view, dual microphones with echo cancellation, and USB 3.0 plug-and-play.

products.name: 4K All-in-One Video Bar — NT-EC-VB-4K
products.description: Integrated video bar combining 4K UHD camera, 6 beamforming microphones, and full-range speaker. 20MP sensor, 120° FOV, AI auto-framing, and mechanical pan/tilt for complete conference coverage.

products.name: 4K Dual-lens PTZ Video Bar — NT-M2000S
products.short_description: 4K Dual-lens · 12x Zoom · AI Group Framing · Speaker Tracking
products.description: Premium dual-lens PTZ video bar with panoramic (8.51MP, 120° FOV) and close-up (8.29MP, 12x zoom) cameras. AI group framing, speaker tracking, and presenter tracking for large meeting rooms.
key_features: All-in-one: dual 4K cameras + 8-mic array + stereo speakers
AI group framing with face/human shape recognition
Speaker tracking with sound source localization
Presenter tracking via ReID and gesture recognition

categories.name: Interactive Panels
categories.tagline: AI digital boards for classrooms & boardrooms
categories.description: AI-powered interactive panels with infinite canvas, 4K UHD display, 20-point multi-touch, and octa-core processor. Available in sizes from 55" to 98".

products.name: Interactive Panels — X75 Pro AI
products.description: 75-inch AI digital board with on-board AI whiteboard, infinite canvas, and centralised device management. Octa-core processor runs apps natively with 20-point optical touch and real-time handwriting recognition.
key_features: Octa-core processor — runs apps without PC

categories.name: PTZ Cameras
categories.tagline: AI-powered PTZ cameras for large venues & broadcast
categories.description: Professional PTZ cameras from 1080P to 4K@60fps with AI auto-tracking, up to 30x optical zoom, and support for HDMI, SDI, USB, NDI, and Dante AV-H.

products.name: 4K PTZ Camera — NT-VX71UVS
products.description: Professional 4K PTZ camera with 8.42MP sensor, 12x optical zoom, 71° ultra-wide FOV, AI auto-tracking, and 255 presets. PoE powered for simple single-cable installation.
key_features: H.264 Slice/SVC for Zoom, Teams, WebEx

products.name: 4K Super Telephoto PTZ Camera — NT-VX630AL
products.short_description: 4K@60fps · 30x Zoom · AI Humanoid Tracking · Dante AV-H · Virtual Studio
products.description: Premium 4K PTZ camera at 60fps with 30x optical zoom, AI ReID humanoid tracking, Dante AV-H support, and virtual studio capabilities. The broadcast-grade solution for large spaces.
key_features: AI ReID humanoid tracking — re-acquires if lost
Free-D protocol for virtual studio integration

products.name: 1080P AI PTZ Camera — NT-EC-HD-30X
products.short_description: PTZ · 30x Zoom · 1080P Full HD · AI Auto-Tracking · Ultra-Long Range
products.description: 1080P Full HD PTZ camera with AI auto-tracking, 30x optical zoom (2.5× greater range than 12x models), face recognition, and ultra-low light at 0.5 Lux. Multi-output: HDMI, SDI, USB, LAN.
key_features: 30x optical zoom — extended range for large venues
Multi-output: HDMI, SDI, USB, LAN, NDI|HX

products.name: 1080P AI PTZ Camera — NT-EC-HD-12X
products.short_description: PTZ · 12x Zoom · 1080P Full HD · AI Auto-Tracking
products.description: 1080P Full HD PTZ camera with 12x optical zoom, 72.5° ultra-wide angle, AI auto-tracking, face recognition, and advanced ISP image processing for balanced color in any lighting.
key_features: Advanced ISP: auto white balance & exposure
